subcodes.title: Words spoken at Windsor Hotel in Montreal, 1912-09-07
subcodes.first_line: The foundation of all religions is one and the aim of all creeds of the world is also one. All are believers in the oneness of God.
subcodes.first_line_orig: و مقصد امم و مذاهب عالم مقصد واحد زیرا جمیع معتقد بوحدانیت الهی هستند و واسطه ئی را بین خلق و خالق لازم میدانند
subcodes.subjects: @outward and inward meanings, @differences between the Manifestations; station of distinction, @oneness; unity of religion, @literal interpretation, @corruption and renewal; abandoning religious dogmas
